headline: Dominion Energy (D) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Dominion Energy (D) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +6.95% and +17.22%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Assessing NRG Energy’s (NRG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: What recent moves in NRG Energy (NRG) might mean for investors NRG Energy (NRG) has drawn attention after a solid 1 day gain of 4.4%, adding to a roughly 6.5% move over the past month and a modest positive return over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for NRG Energy. That recent 4.4% one-day share price return sits against a weaker year-to-date share price return of 6.4% and a much stronger one-year total shareholder return of 37.9%. This suggests recent momentum has picked up after...
